name: Nezha

skills.name: Scorching Ember
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed and a shield that negates true damage when attacking the enemy.

skills.name: Fire-tipped Spear - Sweep
skills.description: Attacks nearby enemies, dealing damage. This attack also weakens the recovery capability of heroes and deals true damage over time.

skills.name: Red Armillary Sash - Bind
skills.description: Flips behind the target to deal damage.

skills.name: Universe Ring
skills.description: Unleashes the universe ring, dealing damage to enemy heroes across the entire map and gaining vision. Enhances the range of Universe Ring - Skyfall to cover the entire map for 5s.

skillsZh.name: 炙煉火種
skillsZh.description: 哪吒攻擊敵人會獲得真實護盾和加速效果。

skillsZh.name: 火焰三尖槍
skillsZh.description: 哪吒攻擊周圍目標造成傷害，弱化英雄的回復能力，並持續造成真實傷害。

skillsZh.name: 混天綾・束
skillsZh.description: 翻滾至目標身後並對其造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 乾坤圈
skillsZh.description: 哪吒放出乾坤圈，對全圖範圍內的敵方英雄造成傷害並獲得視野，且5秒內將【乾坤・天降】的施放範圍強化為全圖範圍。

tips: Build: Axe of Torment, Blazing Cape, Dragon's Rage.
tipsZh: 哪吒（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 52.07%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：暗影戰斧、紅蓮斗篷、怒龍劍盾.

patchHistory.detail: "Nezha often initiates team fights, which also means that he tends to draw the enemy's firepower. As such, we've enhanced his base stats so that he can survive until his teammates arrive to help."

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「哪吒團戰中往往一馬當先，很容易吸引敵方的全部火力，我們適當提高他的基礎屬性，讓他能夠等到隊友的支援和配合。」

faqs.question: Is Nezha good in current season?
faqs.answer: Nezha is Tier B Tank with 52.07% win rate, 0.52% pick rate, and 0.09% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Nezha build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Axe of Torment, Blazing Cape, Dragon's Rage, Spikemail, Sage's Sanctuary, Immovable - Sky Dome.

faqs.question: How to counter Nezha?
faqs.answer: Pick Augran, Wukong, Musashi. Strong into Mai Shiranui, Mozi, Nuwa.

faqsZh.question: 哪吒 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 哪吒 為 B 梯度，勝率 52.07%、選取 0.52%、禁用 0.09%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 哪吒 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：暗影戰斧、紅蓮斗篷、怒龍劍盾、反傷刺甲、賢者的庇護、不動・天穹.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 哪吒？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Augran、Wukong、Musashi。哪吒 克制 Mai Shiranui、Mozi、Nuwa。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Mozi, Nuwa. Weak into: Augran, Wukong, Musashi.

guide.overview: Nezha is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.6% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Nezha: Gains Movement Speed and a shield that negates true damage when attacking the enemy.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Frostscar's Embrace, Cuirass of Savagery, then complete Blood Rage, Blazing Cape, Overlord's Platemail. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Nezha's Tank kit. Take Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Fire-tipped Spear - Sweep → Red Armillary Sash - Bind → Universe Ring → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Universe Ring (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Fire-tipped Spear - Sweep, and Universe Ring on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Fire-tipped Spear - Sweep → Red Armillary Sash - Bind → Universe Ring → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Nezha sits at Tier B globally (51.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Nezha vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Nezha has +0.2% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Nezha when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Nezha vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 0.7% more often globally. Choose Nezha when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Nezha excels into Mai Shiranui, Mozi, Nuwa. Avoid blind picking into Augran, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.
